Me gusto: Daydream Island was a fantastic location for a family holiday where the "KIDS" are now young adults. The resort has all bases covered with great rooms including views of the ocean and in room entertainment if required. The bars and restaurants with the living reef spread throughout is amazing. It never got old having a drink or meal whilst colourful fish, sharks and rays swam past in full view. The pools and swim up bar along with the beach shack selling Poke Bowls and Mexican style burgers poolside was a treat also. We were lucky enough to have a bespoke meal for our sons 21st and it was amazing. Four delicious courses with paired wines and the mains presented at the table by the head Chef. Very special indeed and served at a table in the underwater observatory room. We explored the outer barrier reef for a day with the family undertaking introductory scuba experience and a short helicopter flight. A catamaran trip on Camira to Whitehaven Beach and a drift snorkle through Hook Passage was also a great day out with an open bar on the sail home.
No me gusto: Small issue but maybe a few harder pillows on offer would be nice.

I am not one to leave a review typically, but wow....what a disappointment. Customer service prior to arriving on the island was non existent. Phone calls either cut out, or are left unanswered. Messages not returned. I tried for days to speak to someone in regards to the transfers included in our package but it was impossible to speak to someone. Transfers promised to be booked days before travel were booked at 2pm the day before, which would be fine if someone just explained that.
The island itself is deserted. Staff were miserable, some were rude, or just non existent (I guess that could be a testament to working conditions?) Couldn't get a drink for 25 minutes. Also, don't arrive on the island expecting to eat anything. There is ONE LUNCH OPTION with food only available at 12pm..so expect the whole island to be waiting for food. No other options for snacks or sandwiches. We were told there were Mrs Mac pies and servo sandwiches at the convenience store....but there were gone because everyone was probably starving. Lack of food could be replaced with a cocktail, but don't expect to be served or find a bar that actually opens at their opening times.

Our room was okay. Not cleaned properly. 

Total disappointment compared to what the island used to be.

Me gusto: Not a lot to like on Daydream Island!! Upstairs restaurant was great, food really good. The main pool looked great, the swim up bar also looked great. Saw a snake on far side of the island, that was cool. Played tennis and Volleyball on very run down courts. kids enjoyed that. Thats about it.
No me gusto:
Booked for 8 days in two SUPERIOR POOL SIDE TWIN Rooms for the family. Within an hour of arrival I was at Reception trying to get a paid upgrade to something that resembled the Pictures from the website or one of the newer rooms. Manager was unable to accomodate!! Said he would try, but did nothing. 
The room was disgusting, mould and hair in the bathrooms, rust in one of the baths, shower screens so scummed up you could carve your name into it, the room was dark, uncomfortable and claustraphobic. 
Salti's restaurant was okay, if you enjoy eating with the local Bush Stone Curlews, at one point we had 5 at our table just crapping on the floor whilst we were trying to eat.
Needless to say we cut our trip short by 4 days, no refund of course!! In fact they tried to give me an invoice for nearly 2k for Accomodation because they hadnt updated something in the back end. 
Couldn't wait to get out of there, spent the next 4 days in Airlie, kids loved it!!!

Me gusto: The location. Rooms are quite decent too.
No me gusto: The service is the worst I’ve ever seen in my life, and it gives the impression that staff is not trained at all. First, when we were in the Marina at Hamilton Island, we were told that there were only 2 ferry tickets booked, despite having 3 people in the reservation. I had to call the hotel in order to sort that situation out and it took almost 15 minutes for someone to pick up. Once we arrived at the hotel, there was no one to take the luggage to the room neither to take it back to the ferry, you have to do it yourself. Incompatible with a hotel that is rated 4 and a half stars. The service on the restaurants was even worse: always took forever, multiple items not available in the menu, wrong dishes were brought to the table, as well as the wrong bill. Cleaning is also an issue. Dirty spots around the beds and there is a disgusting carpet on the hallways that is always wet. On the common areas, birds go inside, so there is bird excrements on the floor at reception, on the carpet, on the restaurant’s floor. Lastly, you can’t go into the sea and the pools are not heated.

Me gusto: Everything was brilliant!! Palm trees, beautiful gardens & walkways, great beaches and the fact you can snorkel & see tropical fish from the island's own beaches, with coral & colourful fish at both Lovers Cove & the other side of the island where kayaks were available to use! Saw turtles pop their heads up too! Loved our room, 2248, in Driftwood wing, a Terrace Ocean View King room. Loved the free, all you can eat breakfasts too! Staff all friendly & helpful. The Living Reef was well done & the daily free display & talk by a marine specialist was great. Highlight was watching gorgeous sunsets at Lovers Cove with a background of free live music, which was also on each evening at the resort bar. The island's very healthy looking, tame wallabies were so cute, as were the funny, long legged curlew birds. We'd recommend this place to everyone. Rooms were well sound proofed so couldn't hear noise from inside other rooms. Catered for everyone, with places for a quiet read or active experiences.
No me gusto:
Need more snorkelling gear & also have some  available at other side of island too where free kayaks are, not just at Lovers Cove.
Have snacks for sale, as well as drinks, at Lovers Cove at sunset, even just basics like packets of chips or nuts.

Me gusto: I absolutely loved Daydream island resort! If you’re looking for a relaxing getaway with beautiful views (without the hefty price tag) this is the place for you! Our room was very spacious, clean and had the most incredible views of the ocean! The breakfast was 10/10- It had such a large variety (eggs, bacon, cakes/sweets, lots of fresh fruit, pancake station, yoghurts, cold meats and cheeses etc.). The best part was the amount of activities the resort offered. Despite being on a small island there was always something fun to do and something new to explore and see (eg jet ski, kayak, tennis, snorkel). There were multiple pools so it never got over-crowded and you could relax in peace. The staff were lovely and very attentive; nothing was ever too much effort. I hope to be back in the future! I’ll be recommending to everyone I know. Thanks for the awesome experience!
No me gusto: It can get quite repetitive eating at the only 2 restaurants on the island so it would be great if they had more variety on the menu’s or offered another restaurant in the resort. The ice-cream parlour Cassowary’s closed at 4pm which was a bit restrictive (especially if you had a busy day of doing activities on the island) and just wanted an ice cream in the afternoon.

Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 28 de junio de 2024
Me gusto: #¿NOMBRE?
No me gusto:
- Very uncomfortable mattress in the room

- Aircon kept going on in the room as it was set to timer, i did not want it on all the time as most nights it was cold on the island. Tried to turn it off and couldn’t. 

- The bar area where all the seats are, are really dirty with stains all over them these should be steamed cleaned and tables need to be wiped down regularly. 

- Coconut tree’s should be maintained so they do not fall and hit someone, one was a metre away from hitting myself, these could badly injure someone. 

- More lights around the Island at night time especially walking to and from Salti restaurant, this can be so dangerous as one section you cannot see the pool as it is pitch black. 

- Staff could be more friendlier and helpful all around the Island, i found most of them a little lazy and quite rude. 

- There should be more activities to do on the Island when it is raining. 

- Island bottles of water, packets of chips, milkshakes etc are very over priced. 

- The other side of the Island should be better maintained and looked after, especially the outdoor cinema area. 

- The birds on the Island should all be fed i felt really sorry for them as they only have the island to search for food and are limited, this is why they are trying to scavenger from peoples food indoors (which i didn’t have a issue with as i love animals but i think these guys should be looks after also) 

- There should be a better system in paying for your dinner instead of getting asked what your room number is without showing proof to the staff, everyone should pay as they go as any guest can say any room number they want. I think this is super unprofessional as it happened to the couple my partner and i went with. In other words you are allowing guests to walk out of the restaurant without paying as they said a random room number, how is this traced back to them? Are they just getting free dinners? This system should be much better!

Me gusto:
Room was clean and the bed comfortable. 
Tea cup and glass ridiculously small, not enough more than a mouthful.
No me gusto:
This was my 3rd visit to Daydream and unfortunately I probably won’t return. There was little to do. I planned off island activities each day as a result. We did visit in the cooler months and there were less people staying on the island so I understand the economic impact, but you should still want guests to want to come back? More activities are needed, however my main complaint with the island is the ‘untrained’ staff who desperately need customer service training, the staff were so unfriendly and made you feel like it was a complete imposition if you asked them to do anything…. They were there but not there for you. 
We ate at Salti the first night. We arrived and stood there waiting, 3 feet from a staff who completely ignored us, for several minutes, you don’t need to stop in the middle of completing a task but just acknowledge guests and tell them you see them and will be with them shortly. It’s just rude! There were plenty of staff busy typing into their menu stations… continuously or congregating together chatting with their backs to you. The staff would take your order but that was the extent of the service. We didn’t even have a drink order taken. I went and ordered drinks myself at the front desk despite the numerous staff milling around who seemed to try to avoid customer contact. I ordered the mushroom risotto, it was a grey glug, the mushrooms were slimy and glutinous (definitely not made fresh) and there was this stringy unidentifiable ingredient… absolutely awful. I wanted to order a desert but as I couldn’t get a staff to acknowledge me… we just decided to go to the front desk and get the check. I was asked how the meal was. I said that the risotto was inedible, no response. Ordered fries to go for the rest of our stay.

Me gusto: While not as bougie as the Hayman Island Resort, there is a lot to do at this resort. There are 2 restaurants on the island and the food options include an asian restaurant and a burger and pizza type of place. But vegetarian options available too and a small gift shop in the main lobby. But the key thing is the amazing activities to do on the resort (swimming with stingrays, live reef, sunset beach area behind with a rainforest pathway too to hike, sailing lessons that can be done from the island and scubadiving from island. The island has two sides, one for day trip and one for people staying. Big pools to swim in plus beach side. Great views. Easy to access port to go to reef or white haven tours as well as snorkeling tours or back to mainland to airlie beach or hamilton island. Walaroos are cute as anything on the island and you can feed them apples and bread and rice etc. like they are your pet dog. The cockatoos too. There was also paint and sip and other activities as well. Very family friendly. There is an underwater observatory room(an aquarium of sorts) and morning yoga in that room. there is also a kids section and other such aquariums throughout. It is beautiful paradise
No me gusto: The rooms could've been a little fancier but it was nice otherwise

Me gusto:
This is one of the best holidays I’ve ever had. I have traveled all over the world, and if I’m perfectly honest, I was a little unsure about Daydream island as I had read a few poor reviews after I booked it.. I am here to defend the resort as I swear it was so so so amazing.
Here are some of the highlights for us:
- amazing pools for playing in, perfect temperatures and the swim up bar was super fun too!
- best food in the Salti restaurant (also a really lovely waitress, didn’t catch her name but she had dark hair and was from Wisconsin and so wonderful to our family- I hope her boss sees this!)
- amazing dining in “Infinity” for my dads birthday where all the staff came out and sang to him and made him feel really special with a great table/view of the ocean. The food and bev manager, he was so lovely, I really want to compliment the training he gives to the staff as they were ALL fantastic, I really mean it. We live in a world where service is pretty average these days and we saw the complete opposite here!
- tour desk “Gabby” was mega helpful and made some great suggestions for our time here and budget- was so nice having genuine tips instead of just trying to sell us the most expensive experiences.
-the breakfast buffet has a lot of options and everything was so lovely and fresh, I loved the passion fruit and pineapples, so deeelish!
-we went and did a guided snorkel in the resorts Living Reef and Tiff was the best guide ever. None of us are great swimmers and have never snorkeled so she was super patient and really kind to the whole family. It was the best experience of my life!  I highly recommend doing this, even if you’re an experienced snorkeler as we saw so many beautiful species and fish!
-we went on the Great Barrier Reef tour and the people from the hotel to the whitsundays cruises people were so helpful and just want you to have the best holiday!
No me gusto: Of course there are some things that weren’t perfect, nothing is entirely perfect. But I really can’t fault the resort as they provided the best trip ever for our family!

Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Doble Superior con vistas a la piscina - 2 camas
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 13 de noviembre de 2023
Me gusto: The Living Reef was great.
No me gusto: Other than the living reef, the facilities were very poor.  One end of the island was all boarded up, like something out of a zombie apocalypse.  Quite literally it felt like the set of a zombie film, all closed up and abandoned shops and cafes.  It was awful.  You are not allowed to bring food to the island, yet the food options are limited and over-priced.  Particularly the children’s meals ($16.50 for a kids meal when at most resorts little kids eat free…).  There is also limited (almost no) healthy options available.  There is no in-room dining, and two nights one of the restaurants was closed and it wasn’t possible to get a table easily in the one restaurant that was open.  We eat at 5pm with our small children and still couldn’t get a table.  We had to get takeaway meals and try to eat in our room, which was disgusting since we had no cutlery or plates to eat off.  Not exactly the resort experience we were expecting for the $500 a night price tag… It was such a shame as I have fond memories of the resort from years ago.  It is like the resort is actively trying to lose money and just deliver the bare minimum to its guests.  The pools are also not heated, which is a problem during stinger season as they were just too cold for my toddler to enjoy swimming.  That was unexpected as most resorts heat their pools.  Even in the tropics.  The animals and birds also harass you while you eat, and I saw staff feeding the wallabies, which only encourages them to continue to hassle the guests.  This also raised some serious hygiene concerns for us.  Nearly every night we saw wallabies getting into the kitchen and cutlery of the breakfast location.  For the price point - resort pricing, it really isn’t worth the money.  Don’t go.  You are better off going to Hamilton Island.  Sadly lovers cove is completely destroyed, so there is no longer the great snorkelling there once was on the island.

Me gusto: There were a lot of positives, it was such a relaxing & calm place to be. Walking around the island, watching the sunrise & the sunsets it was a really peaceful part of the world. The water was like nothing I had seen before & there were plenty of spots to sit & take it all in. The rainforest walk was a nice way to take in the views & watching the sunsets at lovers cove was definitely a highlight. It was a good place to be to slow down & recharge. Massage at the day spa was one of the best although if you wanted to do anything you had to book well in advance. The staff were always friendly & happy to help answer any questions. I would definitely recommend the guided meditation in the under water observatory, definitely was a great way to relax before heading home. I'll always look back at the photos & remember what an amazing spot this was.
No me gusto: Unfortunately for a resort it wasn't quite what I was expecting. My room was very dusty, you could see the dust on the phone etc without any lighting, some of the furniture in my room was quite worn. Ordered room service which was mostly fine however the cheese platter was really stale & understandably it is an island however food options were very limited & not very great. I would recommend Infinity restaurant over inkstone, that was good each time I went. Activities on the island were very limited for a resort of that size e.g. sailing lessons were offered every few days however there was only one spot per day. Also was very sad that half the island was essentially abandoned, near the water sports section (Sunset Beach), there was a pool that needed some TLC & about 6 empty (some decaying) shop fronts, restaurants, mini golf (completly boarded up) & a bar sitting empty. It was also disappointing to see this area being used in an instagram story just a few days after I got back making it look like that area was still in use.

Titulo del comentario: Avoid at all costs. Absolutely not worth it and cannot emphasise this enough. A lot of changes need to be undertaken.
Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Doble Superior con vistas a la piscina - 2 camas
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 3 de octubre de 2023
Me gusto:
The location and the aquarium. That was literally it. It has so much potential but disappointed so frequently. Would not go back.
I have travelled and stay at a variety of different hotels across Australia, mostly for work and this was by far the worst experience I’ve had.
No me gusto:
Mouldy pillows. We asked for them to be replaced, which they did, with further mouldy pillows. Which in my opinion is so disgustingly unacceptable, I couldn’t talk to staff about it without getting angry. Given it’s not their fault, it’s not fair to lump that on them. As a side note, I had allergies the whole time, no doubt stemming from the mouldy pillows so thank you so much for that. The room was also so filthy, we had to clean it with some wipes ourselves. 
Restaurants were sub par, we understand the cost, having a monopoly on the island, we knew that going in, but would have happily paid $10 more each meal for at least quality food and not meals made with such poor ingredients, it sat on your stomach all day. Luckily my family and I don’t have stomach issues, avoid at all costs if you do.
Playground is literally three different swings and a slide, similar to the backyard playground we have at home which is less than idea when weather isn’t optimal. 
Unfortunately, despite the signs, guests continue to feed the wallaroos. This behaviour is unacceptable and whilst I understand you can’t control guests, policing it a little more should be undertaken, at the very least so you don’t have to witness a Wallaroo at the table next to you have diarrhoea whilst you’re eating dinner. 
The pool toilets adjacent the salt pool were disgusting and appeared to have been missed for several cleaning cycles.
None of my complaints should be misconstrued to be directed at the staff on site, my complaints are solely directed towards upper management who, at the end of the day, are in control of the accommodations and amenities.  You absolutely cannot charge the amount per night that this hotel is charging under the current conditions. It’s frankly appalling and also insulting.
After the second day, we attempted to book accommodation at Hayman island which was unfortunately sold out. Spend the extra money and go there or Airlie Beach or Hamilton Island. Literally anywhere but here

Titulo del comentario: Overbooked and understaffed.  Looked like Daydream Islands best days are behind it.
Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Doble Resort con cama grande
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 1 de octubre de 2023
Me gusto:
Lovely beautiful island, friendly staff (but very inexperienced staff).
A few fun activities for kids.
Pools were great.
No me gusto:
1) We had 2 rooms booked - 1 for my wife and I, and 1 for my 13 year old son. You would expect the rooms to be placed near each other at a minimum, ideally with adjoining rooms. However, they started by checking us into different wings of the hotel.  We had to request the rooms be next to each other. They could only manage rooms 5 doors apart.
2) When booking activities we had to wait in the queue for 20 minutes, and then the staff had to use 3 different systems, to book a simple activity. The booking system did not match with what was actually allowed in practice -  the booking system only allowed 6 people on the activity, but in practice they were able to cater for 8 people.  
3) There were only 3 restaurants on the island.  We ate in all of them and they were all below expectations.  The staff were over worked, the food was below expectations.  One night we wanted take away from Inkstone, but they stopped take away orders with no warning. At the breakfast buffet, they were taking individual orders for fried or poached eggs when there was a huge queue.  They only had cooked batch scrambled eggs.  This made no sense, why not just cook batch friend and poached eggs as well?
4) There was fluff and dust and little bits of dirt on the floor of our rooms when we moved into our room.
5) On Sat 23rd of Sept 23 at 10pm there was a fire alarm.  It was a false alarm, but no staff member came to tell us this, we had to rely on other guests to communicate this.  Apparently there had been a similar alarm 2 days before.

Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 18 de septiembre de 2023
Me gusto: The staff members were friendly, helpful and approachable (with very few exceptions). The location is obviously great (it's a tropical island).
No me gusto:
The hotel is very poorly managed. Staff are not trained properly (this is noticeable after a couple of days, but we also asked numerous staff members about it, and they said they received little to no training). The alarm system went off (in error) at 11:30pm and 12:30am on two consecutive days, and a few other times during daytime. The room was poorly cleaned when we arrived, including chocolate wrappers in the drawers. Daily room cleaning would only happen mid-afternoon, which was often when our toddler was sleeping. Our luggage was lost - we were then told by reception that they had located it and would bring it to our room in approx. 2 hours. 3 hours later (after trying to call reception and nobody answering the phone), I walked out to the foyer to find both suitcases just sitting there, unattended. The coffee (paid coffee) was terrible. Their primary (Tonic Bar) bar didn't have tonic (how ironic) during the entire week we were there. The cinema was not working for 6 out of the 7 nights we stayed. There were very limited activities available during windy days (which was most of our stay). In the main beach, there are only 17 sun beds (for a hotel that can acommodate 400-500 people), many of which were in terrible condition. They were also other shortages on certain days, including ingredients for drinks, beach towels, etc. 

The hotel could really use a new operations manager who can review their current systems and training protocols, and make simple changes that would fix most of the problems. Until that happens, I strongly recommend not visiting.

Titulo del comentario: Great place, stunning views and wildlife, what else would you asked for
Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Superior con vistas a la piscina - Cama extragrande
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 18 de septiembre de 2023
Me gusto:
Place was really clean and staff were nice. They were always cleaning the pool in the mornings and the place overall was always tidy

Food was ok, it would have been nice having a bit more food options but what they had was tasty and well presented
No me gusto:
Would have liked to have more activities for the kids. The weather was really windy and all Water Sport activities were closed. So it would have been nice to have a bit more activities for the kids. 

Also, we enjoyed having some eco-tourism in the place, having all this kangaroos and birds around. It was a shame that we saw few of them digging into the rubbish bin and even some of them eating straws from people who left their empty drinks behind. It would be nice if you put a hit more effort on taking care of the local animal, maybe changing the rubbish bins so they won’t reach in and possible banning straws from the drinks (surely people would indefinitely you explain why are you doing it). 

Just a few suggestions, because having a great place, stunning views and wildlife all around it will get you really far.

Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 23 de agosto de 2023
Me gusto:
Amazing location.
Great potential.
The room itself was excellent. Large, modern, clean and comfortable.
No me gusto:
Not like photos. No sand on beaches. These allude to soft white sand the whole way around, only 1 half of the island is really in use. Also, there is no grass left - the wallaroos have eaten it all. This really needs to be checked Booking.com.
All backpacker staff - lacking some management. Never seemed to be senior staff about, but they are trying!
Seemed to run out of basics - milk, juice - unacceptable in 2023 - put a robust stock system in place - you are an island - plan ahead. There are multiple ferries from Airlie all day, be restocked the night before.
Limited options to eat for an island (we understood this beforehand) but booked into 1 of 2 options (3rd "Graze" does not operate outside of self serve breakfast) to find it closed unannounced one night.
Payments / ordering system always had issues. Really slow or not working at all or charged to wrong table. Queue of 10 people trying to pay at one stage, took 20 mins. 
Southern end of island needs to be shut off - its all boarded up. Just remove it from the resort completely. Take it off your map, this alludes to it being functional. The walk down there just shows areas where it is rundown - maintenance yards, water tank - quite the eye sores. 
Wildlife- more needs to be done to prevent Wallaroos eating cardboard / plastic - it's pretty sad to witness. Bin's left full at night so naturally they take the rubbish. Glasses / drinks / towels left out at night also. We all understand they are there - but you need to do more to either keep them out - or prevent them accessing the rubbish.

Me gusto: Amazing location and staff
No me gusto:
Kangaroos and curlews inside restaurants while guests are dining. Kangaroos taking napkins off tables and dropping poo right beside guests eating inside the restaurant. The kangaroos have destroyed all of the lawn/ turf in the resort so even the resort looks a little worse for wear. Have to watch your step when walking inside any restaurant, building or reception are otherwise you will walk through kangaroo droppings.
The rooms were clean though black mould found in all corners of the shower and growing thick in the air conditioner. Phone in room wasn’t working. You have to purchase drinking water. They don’t restock mini bars, if you want something reception tells you to go purchase it from one of the bars and just take it to your room. They need to think about rewording their website because “luxury” and “tranquil” are not how I would rate daydream island. Very disappointing considering the price you pay to stay in these places.

Me gusto: The south end of the island was probably our favourite spot with it being a lot quieter and having free water activities such as pedal boarding and kayaking. There was a pool as well as a bar (Rumbah) next to it - the guy working there was very friendly. There was also easy access to the ocean if you wanted to swim, which was very refreshing as the pool water was quite warm. I recommend bringing water shoes as the beach is not sandy due to all the washed up dead corals. Lovers Cove was a beautiful spot for snorkelling and a drink later on. Breakfast was great and had a variety of food to keep us filled up until dinner. Food at Salti and Infinity was great as well but overpriced.
No me gusto: Wait time to order and be served at both the restaurants, Salti and Infinity, took up an hour, even when there were empty tables all around us. Our room was also not made up despite having a sign on the door all day. The water pressure in the shower wasn’t great either.

Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Deluxe Ocean con terraza - Cama extragrande
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 2 de febrero de 2025
Me gusto: Pięknie położony hotel na Rajskiej wyspie. Zdecydowałyśmy się na pokój z widokiem. Przed tarasem latały piękne papugi i biegały kangury - coś niesamowitego. Pokój przestronny i dobrze wyposażony. Bardzo miła obsługa w hotelu, zwłaszcza Pan manager, który pomógł nam w wielu kwestiach, również Panie z recepcji były przemiłe. Świetny basen i bar basenowy, gdzie można napić się smacznych drinków. Co do jedzenia bar położony niedaleko recepcji serwuje dobre kalmary i tacos z rybą i kalafiorem. Piękne oceanarium na terenie obiektu.
No me gusto: Hotel wymaga gruntownego sprzątania i odświeżenia, wykładzina wymaga radykalnego czyszczenia. Śniadanie bez szału, na przeżycie. Co do reszty restauracji na terenie obiektu obsługa wymaga gruntownego szkolenia z pracą z klientem i kultury osobistej. Przydało by się zainteresować w szkolenie dla personelu bo w ten sposób hotel traci wiele. W jednej restauracji azjatyckiej przyszłyśmy 5 min wcześniej przed naszą rezerwacją, dziewczyna, która tam pracowała wyrzuciła nas przez drzwi i zamknęła je kłódka mówiąc że restauracja otwiera się dopiero za 5 minut, po zapukaniu równo o godzinie rezerwacji przewróciła oczami i dopiero nas wpuściła. Jedzenie w restauracji bardzo słabe, przy takim dostępie do świeżych produktów jedzenie powinno być smaczne. Ryba dnia przesuszona, okropna. Niewykorzystany potencjał tak cudownego miejsca.

Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Resort con 2 camas individuales
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 1 de noviembre de 2024
Me gusto: Das Resort umfasst die komplette Insel - jedoch ist nur der vordere Teil (da, wo man am Hafen ankommt) derzeit geöffnet. Man ist innerhalb von 15-20 Minuten am anderen Ende der Insel, wo allerdings nicht viel los ist (prinzipiell ist hier alles ausgestorben und Baustelle). Der Sonnenuntergang war trotzdem traumhaft schön. Das schnorcheln am hauseigenen Riff war wunderschön, und man bekommt die Ausrüstung kostenlos ausgeliehen! Die Zimmer waren sehr groß und wirklich sehr komfortabel, das Personal sehr freundlich. Das Frühstücksbuffet war reichhaltig und wurde auch immer aufgefüllt. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt!
No me gusto: In den vorherigen Bewertungen kann man bereits lesen, dass man nur zwei Restaurants zur Verfügung hat, die abends schnell ausgebucht sind. Wenn man das aber weiß, kann man reservieren. Hier wäre ein besseres System gut, die Anzahl der Gäste auf der Insel ist ja überschaubar und man könnte durchaus Möglichkeiten schaffen, dass jeder auch ohne Reservierung (und zum Teil langem anstehen trotz Reservierung) einen Platz bekommt. Die Preise sind eher hoch, aber auch darauf waren wir aufgrund der vorherigen Bewertungen vorbereitet.

No me gusto: Ещё до заезда в отель очень долго отвечают на запросы. Ну очень долго. Для отеля такого уровня и таких расценок это неприемлемо. Также разочарованы уборкой номера после двух дней пребывания: заправить кровать и забрать мусор - это не уборка, особенно когда на входе пол так и остался в песке. И в вечернее время просто невозможно ходить по дорожкам - свет бьёт прямо в глаза! Было бы приятнее на балконе поставить хотя бы пару стульев.

Titulo del comentario: Daydream Resort não vale o custo benefício
Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Superior - Cama extragrande - Lado de la piscina
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 28 de diciembre de 2025
Me gusto:
1) Quarto amplo
2) Cama confortável
3) Café da manhã com bastante opções de alimentos 
4) Wallabies que circulam pelo pátio do hotel
No me gusto:
1) Quando chegamos no quarto tinha cheiro literalmente de chulé! Abrimos o frigobar e tinha peixes nele o que colaborou para deixar mais ruim o odor no quarto. Informamos a recepção que disse que enviaria um funcionário para retirar os peixes e limpar. Ficamos 3 dias lá e 2 noites e ninguém apareceu pra retirar ou limpar. No segundo dia, 2 crianças bateram no quarto, perguntando sobre os peixes do frigobar, quando informamos que chamamos um funcionário que passava no corredor e entregamos os peixes pra ele.
2) O chão do quarto era grudento e sujo.
3) No dia da saída, estava no banheiro e vi uma barata caminhando na minha necessaire que estava no balcão da pia. Foi extremamente desagradável!!! Como a minha escova de dentes se encontrava no mesmo lugar, tive que colocá-la fora. 
4) Os restaurantes ficam abertos somente até às 20h e quem chega às 19:30 é mal atendido e dizem que não tem mais determinadas comidas. Meus filhos queriam comer frutas com chocolate que estava no cardápio e disseram que as frutas haviam terminado e que não poderiam sair aquela hora para comprar. O que foi extremamente deselegante e anti profissional, em se tratando de um resort, lotado de hóspedes. Eles deveriam ter mais estoque de alimentos. Depois de muita insistência trouxeram pra eles, uns 8 morangos bem feios e só. 
5) O hotel deixou a desejar. Diária altíssima e nem parece que é um resort. Não recomendo.

Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Superior con vistas al mar - 2 camas
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 13 de septiembre de 2024
Me gusto:
Tolle Alleinlage auf der Insel und viele Angebote, besonders für Kinder. Das "Living Reef" mit all den Meeresbewohnern ist beeindruckend. Sehr gut, dass man so viel über das Riff und die Meeresbewohner hier lernen kann. Schön auch, dass überall Wallabees und viele Vögel frei rumlaufen. Natur pur!

Sehr gutes und reichhaltiges Frühstück.
No me gusto:
Leider riecht es ist nach den Exkrementen der Tiere, insbesondere der Wallabees. Besonders im hinteren Teil der Insel bei den Sport- und Spielplätzen, die leider auch teilweise damit verschmutzt sind. Aber das ist halt Natur und man kann nicht alles haben.Wahrscheinlich ist das auch der Geruch der Grund warum kaum jemand sich dort beim Pool aufhält, der eigentlich ganz schön ist, aber wirkt als würde dort nur selten sauber gemacht. (Z.B. große Palmenblätter im Pool auch nach 24 Std und viel Wallabee Exkremente)

Der Service war insgesamt leider enttäuschend. Manche Mitarbeiter wirkten eher demotiviert. Z.B. die Lifeguards am Pool, die eigentlich nur mit ihren Handys beschäftigt waren und/oder Musik auf ihren Kopfhörer hörten.

Als beim Frühstück einem Mädchen die Eier runterfielen ignorierten das die Mitarbeiter, so dass erst die Vögel sich darauf stürzten und danach viele Leute durchliefen und es weiter verteilten. Es wirkte als fühlte sich niemand verantwortlich das wegzumachen bzw. hätte einfach keine Lust.

 Auch als wir einmal bei der Rezeption darauf hinweisen dass ein Vogel (die sind auch überall in den Innenräumen) direkt vor den Fahrstuhl eine große Menge Exkremente hingemacht hatte, gab es keine Reaktion und alles wurde in den nächsten 24 Stunden breit im Flur und im Fahrstuhl durch weitere Personen verteilt. Ziemlich eklig.

Der Wasserspender im Fitnessbereich wurde auch trotz Nachfrage 2 Tage bisbzu unserer Abreise nicht aufgefüllt.

Beispielsweise lag auch ein Zigarettenstummel auf dem Teppichflur vor unseren Zimmer, der auch nach 6 Tagen noch dort lag. Vielleicht wird dort nur alle 7 Tage sauber gemacht oder garnicht?

Ich hatte vor meinem Aufenthalt das Hotel informiert, dass ich einen wirklich wichtigen Brief dort erhalten würde. Kein Problem war dir Antwort, man werde sich darum kümmern und bestätigte die Adresse.

Titulo del comentario: Ein überteuertes, mittelmäßiges Hotel mit schlechtem Service - dort ist nichts zu erleben
Tipo de Habitacion: Habitación Doble adaptada para personas con discapacidad - 2 camas
Fecha del comentario: Fecha del comentario: 18 de enero de 2024
Me gusto:
Das große Aquarium ist eine schöne Idee.
Die Insel könnte schön sein/ hätte Potenzial.
No me gusto:
Der schlechte Service begann bereits beim Check-in: Statt 14 Uhr war es 16.30 Uhr, als das Zimmer fertig wurde. Obwohl man uns sogar einen evtl. Check-in vor 14 Uhr zusagte. Das Zimmer war dann auch direkt nicht bewohnbar, da die Toilettenspülung nicht funktionierte und der Abfluss verstopft war. Also Zimmerwechsel...
Es gab wenig Aktivitäten und die es gibt, sind kostenpflichtig, der Kinderspielplatz winzig. Das Hausriff ist ein Witz - hier gibt es weniger als nichts zu sehen. Deshalb war es im Grunde nur ein teurer Hotelaufenthalt auf einer Insel mit Pool.
Das Hotel war definitiv nicht ausgebucht, dennoch waren die Restaurants am Abend angeblich ausgebucht (man verlangt hier eine Reservierung). Als wir fragten, wo wir auf dieser Resortinsel denn bitte sonst essen sollen, sagte man uns, es wäre nur noch Zimmerservice möglich. Wir sollten also ernsthaft in ein derartiges Hotel fahren, um dann im feuchten Zimmer zu hocken?
Außerdem abstoßend waren die Fäkalien der dort freilaufenden Kängurus, die nämlich nicht nur abseits der Wege zu finden waren. Niemand hat dort etwas gereinigt, so dass man den Kot ständig unter den Schuhen hatte, vermutlich sogar im Pool. Dieser war auch schlecht gereinigt.
Das Personal war nur auf Nachfrage etwas bemüht. Im Grunde scherrt sich aber niemand. Wirklich schade um diese Insel.
